title: Phenotype Library
description: The Phenotype Library provides access to over 300 curated OHDSI phenotype definitions that you can browse, search, filter by domain, and import into your workspace as cohort definitions with a single click. Each phenotype includes metadata such as domain, severity, tags, and a detailed logic description.
tips: Use the search bar to find phenotypes by name or description, such as 'type 2 diabetes' or 'heart failure'.
Filter by clinical domain (Condition, Drug, Measurement, Procedure, Observation, Device) using the domain dropdown.
Click any row to expand it and view the full description and logic details for that phenotype definition.
Click the Import button to create a local cohort definition from any phenotype that has an expression JSON available.
Once imported, the row shows an 'Imported' badge linking directly to your local cohort definition for further editing.
The stats cards at the top show total phenotypes, how many have computable expressions, domains covered, and how many you have already imported.
Phenotypes without an expression JSON (grayed-out Import button) are descriptive only and cannot be imported as executable cohort definitions.
Use pagination at the bottom to browse through the full library, or narrow results with search and domain filters first.
